full_prompt: Design the primary structure of a 3U CubeSat for a student flight-grade program, launching via a standard P-POD / ISIPOD-compliant deployer. The structure must accept six solar panel side plates, a top-facing optical payload aperture, and a bottom-facing deployer rails interface. Envelope must comply with Cal Poly CDS Rev 14.1: 100 mm x 100 mm x 340.5 mm maximum, with four deployer rails of 8.5 mm width on each corner, rail surface area minimum 75% hard-anodized aluminum, center of mass within +/- 2 cm of geometric center on each axis. Total wet mass must not exceed 4.0 kg. Material: primary chassis bus machined from Aluminum 7075-T6 (Young's modulus 71.7 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 503 MPa, ultimate 572 MPa, density 2810 kg/m^3). Load cases (flight-qualification): (LC1) quasi-static launch: 14 g simultaneous along each of the three body axes applied as inertia on wet mass; (LC2) random vibration: Cal Poly CDS 14.1 Grms qualification profile (frequency range 20-2000 Hz, ASD table from CDS), response must show first mode >= 100 Hz and stress margins at the rails; (LC3) sine vibration: 10-100 Hz, 2 g base sweep; (LC4) thermal gradient: -40 C to +85 C uniform swing representing orbit eclipse/insolation cycle, with a 30 C radial gradient from sun-side to shade-side panel. Pass/fail per NASA-STD-5001B metallic protoflight: yield FoS >= 1.25 and ultimate FoS >= 1.4 on the LC1 quasi-static load, i.e., max von Mises <= 503 / 1.25 = 402 MPa on yield gate and <= 572 / 1.4 = 409 MPa on ultimate. First natural frequency >= 100 Hz. Random-vib 3-sigma response stress <= 402 MPa. Thermal deformation of optical payload mounting plane <= 50 microns flatness across the full temperature range. Deliverables: STEP, modal analysis (first 10 modes), quasi-static FEA, random-vib analysis with PSD response, thermal analysis with displacement contour, and structural mass + CM report.
short_prompt:
Design the primary structure of a 3U CubeSat flight-grade bus launching in a standard P-POD / ISIPOD deployer, carrying six side solar panels, a top optical payload aperture, and a bottom deployer-rail interface. Material class: 7075-T6 aluminum. Qualify per Cal Poly CubeSat Design Specification (CDS) Rev 14.1 and NASA-STD-5001B metallic protoflight, with yield FoS 1.25 and ultimate FoS 1.4.

Envelope: 100 x 100 x 340.5 mm max per CDS 14.1, four corner deployer rails, wet mass <= 4.0 kg, CoM within +/- 2 cm of geometric center on each axis.

Load cases.
- LC1 quasi-static launch: 14 g simultaneous on all three body axes on the wet mass.
- LC2 random vibration: CDS 14.1 Grms qualification profile, 20-2000 Hz.
- LC3 sine sweep: 10-100 Hz at 2 g base.
- LC4 thermal: -40 C to +85 C uniform orbit swing with a 30 C radial sun-to-shade gradient.

prompt.title: Student 3U CubeSat primary structure
prompt.brief: 3U CubeSat bus compliant with CDS Rev 14.1 and NASA-STD-5001B, launching in a P-POD/ISIPOD deployer.

load_cases.name: quasi_static_14g
load_cases.application: simultaneous on all three body axes
